Package kp.company.repository

Interface EmployeeRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveCrudRepository<Employee,String>, org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.ReactiveMongoRepository<Employee,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor<Employee>, org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveSortingRepository<Employee,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Employee,String>
public interface EmployeeRepository extends org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.ReactiveMongoRepository<Employee,String>
The MongoDB repository for the Employee objects.
